g.text: Goal: make checkout-service (ours) accept payments through Stripe (external)
ACT 1 · rules as text: CLAUDE.md + a skill, no gateway
ACT 2 · the same rules as data: the Platform Planning Gateway
the right rules, injected as text
✕ direct call: crosses the boundary, skips the proxy
rework: back to the developer, days later
Act 1 feedback: DAYS, outside the loop, full rework
served over MCP at session start
s3 go test ./... ← added by the agent
✓ Stripe call leaves through the egress proxy
